result: Exact-head replay accepted the 26-package, 30-export-row, 539-symbol, 464-TSDoc-gap, 13-changed-package, five-changeset-omission, and ten contract-gap-class discovery claims. Aggregate contract and documentation metrics, the missing checker, and the PR snapshot hash remain rejected.

rejected.reason: non-replayable because scripts/check-public-contract.mjs does not exist
unsupported because current lint does not measure every public documentation example
non-replayable because no path-backed normalized PR snapshot was supplied

wall_gate.reason: CKR-CONTRACT cannot advance while ten supported gap classes remain and the aggregate checker and governed PR snapshot are absent.

commanded_lines: Action envelope: read-only validation; write only workers/validator-dkr-c/verification.v1.json and progress.finish.json; no product, git, frame, tree, ledger, release, or external-state changes.
Validation decision: accept supported discovery claims only; reject unsupported or non-replayable aggregate claims; keep CKR-CONTRACT blocked.
DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
